titleStmt.title: SII 40.297: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 297. (A.R. No. B. 342 of 1933.) Vaḍḍavalli, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up to the east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1078, Uttarāyaṇa Saṅkrānti.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Mallikhārjuna of Oḍḍavelli by Māḍyasāni, the wife of Mandaḍi Koṇḍapa Nāyaka of Tanaruṁbaṟu, who belongs to the Manma-Kula. The gift was entrusted to Kūchanabōya, for supply of ghee to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta guṇaga
ṇādhārasubhaṭa bhaṭadīra
yabhinava vilāsinī ma
nōja vanajahita tēja
manmakulavā¨rddhi va¨rddhana
caṁdragiripugaja mrigēṁdra
maduḍlābharaṇaveṁbe
ballātananni vilāsapati
meccugaṁḍa samaramukha
bhīmakī¨rttimāṁddhāta nāmā
di samasta prasasti sahita
ṁbuna śrīmattanaruṁbaṟa
maṁddaḍi koṁḍapa nāya
kuni peṁḍlamu māḍya
sāni dha¨rmmātthamugā
śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1078
nēṁṭi yutarāyaṇa

saṁkrāṁtti nimi
tyamunanōvōḍḍa
velli mallikhā¨rjju
dēvarakakhaṁḍa
vatti dīpaṁbunaki
ccina goṟiyalu
55 vīniṁjēkoni
kūcanabōyuna
nilaya dana pu
trānupautrikāmā
caṁdrā¨rkamu nitya
māneṁḍu nēyi pō
yaṁggalavāṁḍu .
Digital edition of SII 40.297 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
